endpoints.name: GET /v1/customers
endpoints.description: Lists the user's customer accounts.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/partners/{metadataOwnerId}/devices/{deviceId}/metadata
endpoints.description: Updates reseller metadata associated with the device. Android devices only.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DEVICEID}} with a real deviceid. Replace {{METADATAOWNERID}} with a real metadataownerid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/partners/{partnerId}/customers
endpoints.description: Lists the customers that are enrolled to the reseller identified by the `partnerId` argument. This list includes customers that the reseller created and customers that enrolled themselves using the portal.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARTNERID}} with a real partnerid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/partners/{partnerId}/devices:claim
endpoints.description: Claims a device for a customer and adds it to zero-touch enrollment. If the device is already claimed by another customer, the call returns an error.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARTNERID}} with a real partnerid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/partners/{partnerId}/devices:claimAsync
endpoints.description: Claims a batch of devices for a customer asynchronously. Adds the devices to zero-touch enrollment. To learn more, read [Long‑running batch operations](/zero-touch/guides/how-it-works#operations).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARTNERID}} with a real partnerid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/partners/{partnerId}/devices:findByIdentifier
endpoints.description: Finds devices by hardware identifiers, such as IMEI.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARTNERID}} with a real partnerid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/partners/{partnerId}/devices:findByOwner
endpoints.description: Finds devices claimed for customers. The results only contain devices registered to the reseller that's identified by the `partnerId` argument. The customer's devices purchased from other resellers don't appear in the results.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARTNERID}} with a real partnerid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/partners/{partnerId}/devices:unclaim
endpoints.description: Unclaims a device from a customer and removes it from zero-touch enrollment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARTNERID}} with a real partnerid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/partners/{partnerId}/devices:unclaimAsync
endpoints.description: Unclaims a batch of devices for a customer asynchronously. Removes the devices from zero-touch enrollment. To learn more, read [Long‑running batch operations](/zero-touch/guides/how-it-works#operations).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARTNERID}} with a real partnerid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/partners/{partnerId}/devices:updateMetadataAsync
endpoints.description: Updates the reseller metadata attached to a batch of devices. This method updates devices asynchronously and returns an `Operation` that can be used to track progress. Read [Long‑running batch operations](/zero-touch/guides/how-it-works#operations). Android Devices only.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARTNERID}} with a real partnerid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets a device.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes an unused configuration. The API call fails if the customer has devices with the configuration applied.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates a configuration's field values.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/configurations
endpoints.description: Lists a customer's configurations.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/configurations
endpoints.description: Creates a new configuration. Once created, a customer can apply the configuration to devices.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/customers
endpoints.description: Lists the customers of the vendor.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/customers
endpoints.description: Creates a customer for zero-touch enrollment. After the method returns successfully, admin and owner roles can manage devices and EMM configs by calling API methods or using their zero-touch enrollment portal. The customer receives an email that welcomes them to zero-touch enrollment and explains how to sign into the portal.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/devices
endpoints.description: Lists a customer's devices.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/devices:applyConfiguration
endpoints.description: Applies a Configuration to the device to register the device for zero-touch enrollment. After applying a configuration to a device, the device automatically provisions itself on first boot, or next factory reset.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/devices:removeConfiguration
endpoints.description: Removes a configuration from device.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/devices:unclaim
endpoints.description: Unclaims a device from a customer and removes it from zero-touch enrollment. After removing a device, a customer must contact their reseller to register the device into zero-touch enrollment again.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/dpcs
endpoints.description: Lists the DPCs (device policy controllers) that support zero-touch enrollment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/vendors
endpoints.description: Lists the vendors of the partner.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
